info.title: Spotify Switch Remote
info.author: David Abejon
info.details:
Display and control your Spotify playback from your Nintendo Switch!

- Real-time playback state (track, artist, album art)
- Artist panel — photo, genres, followers, popularity
- Album panel — thumbnail, type, release year, track count, label
- Play / pause, previous and next controls
- OAuth 2.0 PKCE login flow via QR code (no credentials stored in plaintext)
- Auto token refresh in the background

changelog:
v0.1.0

- Display current activity
- Display artist and album info
- Display next 4 elements in queue
- Display user's information (name, pfp, country...)
- Play, pause and skip actions
